reviews.review_description: I downloaded this thinking it would be gtag copy slop. After I downloaded it, it was so good and silly. Great fun to skate around and hit clips. Good selection of weapons and features. After playing for a while, the map size made the weapon spawns a bit predictable. That's a very minor flaw though, my main flaw is how the power ups are temporary. You only have then for that game session instead of it saving. 10/10 game. If you like goofiness and skate, i highly recommend.
It's a really fun game. From the pictures, it looks just like gtag but with guns, but no, you slide around on skateboards and you can boost forward which send you forward Anyways, would recommend.

Now I don’t play Ape Skate Shootout, and I don’t enjoy it that much, but I know it definitely deserves 5 stars! If you don’t know, a lot of work is put into this game, so the community would appreciate it if you could leave a 5 stars!!! ❤️🔥
Very fun game, it got me laughing when the movement was your apes farts
Two toxic teamers were spamming the n word so this is it

developer_response.body: Hey hey, sorry to hear that you didn't have a good time. Can you reach out to us in discord to report these other players? We definitely don't want to tolerate that kind of behavior https://discord.gg/Dryu3A7v

reviews.review_description: Everytime i join its the same server and i keep getting targetted by the same ppl. I can’t kill anyone without being targetted and the server i’m in has 3 ppl including me

developer_response.body:
Hey Luca! 

Sorry to hear that! If you'd like to give it another shot, you can get SkateCash for upgrades without kills by going really fast, or by doing 360's in the air. Then go to the upgrade station to upgrade your weapon damage! Otherwise, you can also make a new or private lobby to avoid toxic players. Thanks so much for your feedback!
